border-radius: 4px; background: var(--jwFC2e); padding: 0px 2px; font-weight: 500;">decouple every stage of the process—from your connection to your payment—from your real-world identity</mark>. This involves using privacy-focused tools like<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Tor</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>or a<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">VPN</strong>, paying with untraceable coins like<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Monero</strong>, and choosing "no-KYC" (Know Your Customer) service providers.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 127.188px;"><img id="img-c8a9adavI-yp5NoP_qfliQI_1" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="monstermegs.com" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">monstermegs.com</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+3</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">1. They consider themselves a "privacy-aware" service that owns the assets on your behalf to keep your name off all records.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">OrangeWebsite</span></strong>: Based in Iceland, this host is a veteran in the free-speech space.
